orchestrator_note: Wave 4 per-version smokes PASS on 1.21.1, 1.21.4, 1.21.11, 1.20.1. Three real directive bugs caught and inline-fixed: (1) AttributeCompat ATTACK_DAMAGE has no GENERIC_ prefix on Mojang (Yarn-only convention), (2) Optional<Holder> registry-get persists through 1.21.11 (upper bound dropped), (3) Mojang 1.20.1 method is getDefaultAttributeModifiers not getAttributeModifiers. These fixes superseded the corresponding P3 informational bugs from Wave 2.
